description_long: This is a single-story, modern ranch-style house with a rectangular footprint and a low, flat roof. The exterior features a combination of white and brown wall finishes, with large windows distributed along the front and rear facades. The house includes two prominent driveways on either side, leading to what appear to be garage or carport spaces. The rear of the house opens onto two fenced green yards, separated by wooden fencing for privacy. The layout suggests multiple rooms, including living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas, all accessible from a central corridor. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story ranch house with a flat roof, dual driveways, and fenced rear yards. The exterior is finished in white and brown with large windows and a practical, open layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, dual driveways, and central entry with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one driveway, the side wall, and partial view of the fenced backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two fenced green yards and the back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other driveway, side wall, and the second fenced backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a simple door, no porch, flanked by large windows and accessible from dual driveways.
